description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from wrangler. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather with textile lining Stitch detailing with serrated effect on the cover and embossed brand logo Two main chambers for storing cash Convenient chambers to store cards Concealed chamber below coin and card holder to store other essentials CareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
